mano_cua.result_summary: 点击左侧 Palette Button 主按钮后，3 个子按钮沿扇形方向正确展开显示（console 输出 expand/expanded 事件确认）。DOM 中存在 3 个 palette-button 实例。右侧按钮亦可点击展开。中间按钮因 responsive 模式下坐标计算复杂未能完全验证，但展开/收起核心功能正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: JavaScript confirmed 3 palette buttons in DOM with positions at left:30px, left:calc(50%-30px), right:30px. Left button expand showed 3 sub-buttons in fan pattern. Console confirmed expand/expanded events. The core expand/collapse functionality works correctly.
